svg.title: MERN stack architecture for ATS SaaS
svg.desc: Four-layer architecture: React frontend, Express/Node backend, MongoDB database, and external services (Gemini AI, Cloudinary, Google OAuth).

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes inside the Auth pages in the React frontend?')
sendPrompt('What components are on the Analysis screen?')
sendPrompt('What does the Application Dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('What shared state management approach should I use in MERN with React Context or Redux?')
sendPrompt('How do I build the auth routes in Express with JWT and Google OAuth?')
sendPrompt('How do I build the file upload and text extraction route in Express?')
sendPrompt('How do I build the AI analysis route that calls Gemini from Express?')
sendPrompt('What middleware should every Express route in this app use?')
sendPrompt('Show me the Mongoose schema for the User model in this app.')
sendPrompt('Show me the Mongoose schema for the Resume model.')
sendPrompt('Show me the Mongoose schema for the Analysis model.')
sendPrompt('Show me the Mongoose schema for the Application tracker model.')
sendPrompt('Show me the Mongoose schema for the JobDescription model.')
sendPrompt('How do I integrate Google Gemini Pro API into my Express backend?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up Google OAuth in an Express + React MERN app using Passport.js?')
sendPrompt('How do I store uploaded resume files in Cloudinary or AWS S3 from Express?')
sendPrompt('How do I generate a PDF from LaTeX in a Node.js backend?')
